auth.title: tiny tracker
auth.subtitle: Track your daily habits and achieve your goals

welcome.title: Welcome to Goal Tracker!
welcome.description: Track daily habits and goals with a visual calendar.
welcome.featureTargetsDesc: Optional weekly/monthly targets with progress bars

offline.message: You're offline. Changes will be saved locally.

goalEditor.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this goal?

profile.noGoals: No goals yet. Create your first goal to start tracking!
profile.exportDescription: Download a copy of all your goals and completions.

error.network: Unable to connect. Please check your internet connection.
error.auth: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
error.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
error.notFound: The item was not found. It may have been deleted.
error.validationName: Please enter a valid goal name.
error.validationFuture: Cannot mark future dates as complete.
error.validationGeneric: Please check your input and try again.
error.server: Server error. Please try again later.
error.sync: Unable to sync your data. Changes will be saved locally.
error.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Get reminded to log your completions.
notifications.permissionDenied: Notifications are blocked in system settings.

reminderBody.daily: Don't forget to log your completions.
reminderBody.weekly: How did your habits go this week?

prompt.title: Stay on track
prompt.body: We'll send you a daily reminder at 19:00 to check in on your goals.

debugReport.title: Report a problem
debugReport.explainer: This will send recent app logs and your device info so we can investigate. Your goal data is not included.
debugReport.clientRateLimited: You just sent a report a moment ago — you can send another in a few seconds.
debugReport.rateLimited: Too many reports. Please try again later.
debugReport.genericError: Could not send report. It will be sent when you're back online.
